exploration_notes: Traced the full FxVanillaOption type family across 4 Strata modules. (1) Domain: All 4 Joda-Beans classes live in modules/product/.../fxopt/ — FxVanillaOption (product), FxVanillaOptionTrade (trade wrapper), ResolvedFxVanillaOption (resolved product), ResolvedFxVanillaOptionTrade (resolved trade). (2) Pricers: 4 classes in modules/pricer/.../fxopt/ — Black model has a product pricer (BlackFxVanillaOptionProductPricer) and trade pricer (BlackFxVanillaOptionTradePricer); Vanna-Volga model similarl
